'''Michael John Sorich''' is an American actor, voice actor, writer, director and voice director who provided voices for several Star Wars video games.

==Works==
===Gameography===
{{Mediacat|soundcat=Audio files of Michael Sorich}}
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]''—[[Antan Azzameen]], [[Borsk Fey'lya]], [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] Pilot 6
*[[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace (video game)|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''The Phantom Menace'' video game]]—[[Mawhonic/Legends|Mawhonic]], Palace Official, Security Door, [[Teemto Pagalies/Legends|Teemto]]
*[[Star Wars: Episode I Racer|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''Racer'']]—Mawhonic, Teemto Pagalies
*''[[Star Wars: Racer Revenge]]''—Mawhonic, Teemto Pagalies
*''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight II: Jedi Outcast]]''—Prisoner 3, Rebel Shock Troop 2
